name: podzi-codex-plugin
description: Podzi assistant workflows for summarizing and answering questions from visible transcript segments in an open Chrome Podzi tab.

interface.shortDescription: Summarize and answer questions from the open Chrome Podzi tab.
interface.longDescription: Use the user's already-open Chrome tab for a Podzi episode and its window.podzi_cli bridge to read only visible, non-muted transcript segments, then summarize or answer questions from that visible transcript text.
defaultPrompt: 用兩百字摘要目前 Chrome Podzi 頁面可見的逐字稿。
根據目前可見的 Podzi 逐字稿回答我的問題。
列出目前可見段落的三個重點。
